title: Add redacted diagnostic error codes to mobile support bundles
outputs: Support debug bundle includes a primary PV-* error code
Support debug bundle explicitly states that prompt/output/source payloads are redacted
Frontend tests cover connection, runtime, and unsupported-action diagnostic codes
do_not_do: Do not include prompt text, assistant output, source code, or terminal output in diagnostics
Do not change WebSocket protocol behavior
Do not change the mobile visual layout beyond diagnostic text generated for copy/export
Do not stage unrelated untracked files
